query: SELECT 'training_sets' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM training_sets UNION ALL SELECT 'puzzle_attempts', COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts UNION ALL SELECT 'cycle_history', COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history
